contents: {a=Person_LynxMum}Lynx's mum{/} tossed a {a=Entity_BurntToast}slice of toast{/} outside after burning it. {a=Person_Lynx}Lynx{/} decided to take this opportunity to document the toast throughout its life. From days 1 to 9, nothing of note occured. However, on day 10, Lynx's mum tried to put it in the bin. But, it was too soggy to pick up and fell apart. On day 11, She scooped it up with some cardboard and tossed it into the bin, ending the experiment.

header: The Weird Witch under Lynx's shed
contents: {a=Person_WeirdWitch}The Weird Witch{/} was found living under {a=Location_LynxShed}Lynx's shed{/}. She was editing a Twitch stream of herself, exploring the house of {a=Person_ZimZimmeroo}Zim Zimmeroo{/}. They recently passed away in their own home, after excreting a golden goblin finger. The Weird Witch used a spirit phone to summon their ghost and communicate with them. The ghost calls out to {a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} with a message for a cash donation. The stream then recieved a total of $42,069 in donations. The ghost said:
"Thy nuts shall be many and your bitches be none"

header: The lynxoniun invasion on Craig manor
contents: {a=Organisation_Lynxoniuns}Lynxoniuns{/} began invading earth to mildly inconvenience the human and {a=Organisation_HyperInteligentOctupi}hyper intelligent octupi{/} races. {a=Person_Aheko}Aheko{/} was the first face them and was quickly defeated. {a=Person_Poppet}Poppet{/} and their bald friend tried escaping but was quickly hunted down. The bald friend was sploingered after trying to fight one of the leaders, whilst Poppet used the time to escape to {a=Location_CraigManor}Craig manor{/}.

{a=Person_CatInTheHat}The Cat in the Hat{/} had a job interview for the position of Galactic Visory of Research Exellence at the {a=Organisation_InterdimensionalCouncilHQ}Interdimensional Council Headquarters{/}. He conquered planet {a=Location_Catopia}Creggtopia{/} and renamed it to "Catopia". They immediately got the job as an unpaid intern.

{a=Person_NovaDante}Nova{/} and his {a=Person_MrDante}dad{/} went on a hiking trip for 3 days and travelled 2026 miles. On this trip they came across a talking bear called {a=Person_Penguin}Penguin{/}. He learnt to talk through a copy of Ann Frank's Diary that was left at their cave. They had a small chat about liking arson and being married to a rock shaped like PaymoneyWubby for 6 years. Nova wanted to continue talking with Penguin, whilst his dad wanted to continue with the hike. It quickly turned into an argument about Penguin being more successfull because they still have a wife. The situation just as quickly turned into a brawl, with Nova's dad getting punched in the crotch. This killed him and now Penguin has offically adopted Nova.

header: Another one of Craig's date streams
contents: {a=Person_Craig}Craig{/} booked another date stream with {a=Person_Jessica}Jessica{/} for their local {a=Location_FluffyPuffyNovasDiabolicerPancakes}Fluffy Puffy Nova's Diabolicer Pancakes{/}. They both ordered a glass of wine and the waiter accidentally spilt Craig's glass all over him. After he retreats to the restroom to clean up, his friend {a=Person_Tokxi}Tokxi{/} shows up to check on him. He invites himself to a seat at the table and reveals personal information about Craig. He tells her that Craig talks a lot about her, when she's not around, and into looking at himself as a pony. When Craig returns, he's surprised to see Tokxi and scooches him to the side. Craig and Jessica order a chicken carbonara each. Whilst waiting for the food to arrive, Tokxi gets Craig to talk about NASCAR. The order then arrives. Hoever, Craig instead receives {a=Product_CraigCumJam}Craig Cum Jam{/} for they had just ran out of carbonara. Craig lets Tokxi have some of it and he consumes the whole jar in 4 seconds. This made Craig furious and he scolded him for "ruining the data". Tokxi went to the corner of the resturant to cry and received a free {a=Product_CumShake}Cum Shake{/} as pity. Jessica also took pity of Toxki and told Craig what they told her. They then both go home to look at Craig as a pony together.

header: The attempted murder of the king of England
contents: {a=Person_KingOfEngland}The king of england{/} was diagnosed with "being Lynx". It was a fairly new disease at the time so nobody knew how much longer he will live. Their jester thought that, if they kill him now, they can take his place on the thrown and control the UK. When there were no guards around, the jester tried to murdered him with a giant clown hammer and completely missed. They were then sentenced to getting tased for 69,420 milliseconds.

{a=Person_BillyMays}Billy Mays{/} launched a new cleaning product called {a=Product_GluckWow}The Gluck-Wow{/}. It can clean anything, from Paint to cum jam soda, with the Hak Tuwuh technology. For the price of 1 BitCoin, you can get 3 Gluck-Wows and a mini Gluck-Wow.

{a=Entity_BurntToast}The Burnt Toast{/} tried to rob a local Lloyd's Bank. They were wielding a flame thrower filled with water and with a cutie patootie floofy poofy boo boo bear sticker. They could only steal $2 in nickles, before getting arrested.
